source_text: 《中华人民共和国公司法》（2023修订，2024.07.01生效）中英对照本
note: 英文术语以该对照本译法为基准（如"股份有限公司"译 joint stock limited company）；国际通行译法在 note 字段标注。所有词条状态为待审校。

collocations: establish a limited liability company 设立有限责任公司
缩写 LLC
words.example_en: The shareholders of a limited liability company shall be liable to the company to the extent of their subscribed capital contributions.
words.example_zh: 有限责任公司的股东以其认缴的出资额为限对公司承担责任。
words.note: 美国的 LLC 是合伙与公司的混合体，与中国有限责任公司并不等同，涉外文件中注意说明。

collocations: company limited by shares（国际通行译法）
incorporation by means of share offer 募集设立
words.example_en: The shareholders of a joint stock limited company shall be liable to the company to the extent of the shares they have subscribed for.
words.example_zh: 股份有限公司的股东以其认购的股份为限对公司承担责任。
words.note: 本对照本译 joint stock limited company；联合国与欧盟文件多用 company limited by shares。

collocations: formulate / amend the articles of association 制定/修改公司章程
as prescribed by the articles of association 按章程规定
words.example_en: A company shall formulate its articles of association according to law, which are binding on the company, its shareholders, directors, supervisors and senior managers.
words.example_zh: 公司应当依法制定公司章程。公司章程对公司、股东、董事、监事、高级管理人员具有约束力。
words.note: 美国公司对应文件为 certificate/articles of incorporation + bylaws 两层结构。

collocations: subscribed capital 认缴资本
paid-in capital 实缴资本
increase / reduce the registered capital 增加/减少注册资本
words.example_en: The registered capital of a limited liability company shall be the capital contributions subscribed for by all shareholders as registered with the company registration authority.
words.example_zh: 有限责任公司的注册资本为在公司登记机关登记的全体股东认缴的出资额。
words.note: 2023修订要点：有限责任公司认缴出资须在成立之日起五年内缴足。

collocations: make capital contributions in currency or in kind 以货币或实物出资
contribute in proportion to... 按比例出资
words.example_en: Shareholders may make capital contributions in currency, or in kind, intellectual property rights, land use rights, equity or claims that can be valued in currency and transferred according to law.
words.example_zh: 股东可以用货币出资，也可以用实物、知识产权、土地使用权、股权、债权等可以用货币估价并可以依法转让的非货币财产作价出资。
words.note: 2023修订新增股权（equity）和债权（claims）作为法定出资形式。

collocations: controlling shareholder 控股股东
minority shareholders 中小股东
shareholders' register 股东名册
words.example_en: Shareholders are entitled to benefits from assets, participation in major decision-making and selection of managers according to law.
words.example_zh: 股东依法享有资产收益、参与重大决策和选择管理者等权利。
words.note: 英式也用 member（公司法语境）；stockholder 为美式用法。

collocations: convene a shareholders' meeting 召开股东会
annual general meeting (AGM) 年度股东大会
extraordinary meeting 临时会议
words.example_en: The shareholders' meeting is the organ of authority of the company and shall exercise its functions and powers according to this Law.
words.example_zh: 股东会是公司的权力机构，依照本法行使职权。
words.note: 2023修订统一称"股东会"（旧法股份公司称股东大会）。国际惯称 general meeting of shareholders。

collocations: board resolution 董事会决议
board meeting 董事会会议
chairman of the board 董事长
words.example_en: The board of directors is the executive organ of the company and is accountable to the shareholders' meeting.
words.example_zh: 董事会是公司的执行机构，对股东会负责。
words.note: boardroom 董事会会议室；on the board 担任董事。

collocations: independent director 独立董事
executive / non-executive director 执行/非执行董事
term of office 任期
words.example_en: Directors shall be elected or replaced by the shareholders' meeting, with a term of office not exceeding three years as prescribed by the articles of association.
words.example_zh: 董事由股东会选举或者更换，任期由公司章程规定，但每届任期不得超过三年。
words.note: 高频陷阱：公司法语境 director 是董事而非"主任/总监"。

collocations: supervisor 监事
supervise the performance of duties 监督履职
words.example_en: The board of supervisors shall examine the financial affairs of the company and supervise the acts of directors and senior managers in performing their duties.
words.example_zh: 监事会检查公司财务，对董事、高级管理人员执行职务的行为进行监督。
words.note: 源自德日双层制（two-tier board）。2023修订允许以董事会审计委员会（audit committee）替代监事会。

collocations: directors, supervisors and senior managers 董监高
general manager 经理
chief financial officer 财务负责人
words.example_en: Senior managers refer to the general manager, deputy general managers, chief financial officer, secretary of the board of a listed company and other personnel specified in the articles of association.
words.example_zh: 高级管理人员是指公司的经理、副经理、财务负责人，上市公司董事会秘书和公司章程规定的其他人员。
words.note: "董监高"合称英文惯用 directors, supervisors and senior management（D&O 保险即 directors and officers liability insurance）。

collocations: serve as the legal representative 担任法定代表人
the legal representative resigns 法定代表人辞任
words.example_en: The legal representative of a company shall be a director or the manager who executes the affairs of the company on its behalf.
words.example_zh: 公司的法定代表人按照公司章程的规定，由代表公司执行公司事务的董事或者经理担任。
words.note: 中国法特有制度，英美公司无对应职位（对外签约权由 authorized signatory 体现），涉外尽调高频考点。

words.zh_plain: 另一法律义：衡平法；会计义：所有者权益
collocations: equity transfer 股权转让
equity pledge 股权质押
hold 51% equity 持股51%
words.example_en: Where a shareholder transfers its equity to a person other than the shareholders, it shall notify the other shareholders in writing.
words.example_zh: 股东向股东以外的人转让股权的，应当将转让事项书面通知其他股东。
words.note: 三义记忆：股权（公司）、衡平法（英美法史）、净资产（会计 owner's equity）。

collocations: exercise the right of first refusal under equivalent conditions 在同等条件下行使优先购买权
waive the right of first refusal 放弃优先购买权
words.example_en: The other shareholders shall have a right of first refusal over the equity to be transferred under equivalent conditions.
words.example_zh: 其他股东在同等条件下对拟转让的股权享有优先购买权。
words.note: 缩写 ROFR。与 preemptive right（增资优先认缴权）严格区分：前者针对老股转让，后者针对新增资本。

collocations: subscribe for the increased capital in proportion to... 按比例认缴新增资本
words.example_en: When a company increases its registered capital, its shareholders shall have the preemptive right to subscribe for the increased capital in proportion to their paid-in contributions.
words.example_zh: 公司新增资本时，股东有权优先按照实缴的出资比例认缴出资。
words.note: 投资协议里常见 anti-dilution（反稀释）条款与之配套。

collocations: adopt a cumulative voting system 实行累积投票制
words.example_en: When the shareholders' meeting elects directors or supervisors, a cumulative voting system may be adopted in accordance with the articles of association or a resolution of the shareholders' meeting.
words.example_zh: 股东会选举董事、监事，可以按照公司章程的规定或者股东会的决议，实行累积投票制。
words.note: 保护中小股东的董事选举机制：每一股份拥有与应选董事人数相同的表决权，可集中投给一人。

collocations: adopt / pass a resolution 通过决议
special resolution 特别决议
the resolution is null and void 决议无效
words.example_en: A resolution of the shareholders' meeting shall be adopted by shareholders representing more than half of the voting rights.
words.example_zh: 股东会作出决议，应当经代表过半数表决权的股东通过。
words.note: 修改章程、增减资本、合并分立解散须经三分之二以上表决权通过（特别决议）。

collocations: exercise voting rights in proportion to capital contributions 按出资比例行使表决权
proxy 委托投票/代理人
class shares 类别股
words.example_en: Shareholders shall exercise their voting rights at the shareholders' meeting in proportion to their capital contributions, unless otherwise prescribed by the articles of association.
words.example_zh: 股东会会议由股东按照出资比例行使表决权，公司章程另有规定的除外。
words.note: 2023修订引入类别股制度，允许发行特别表决权股（weighted voting rights）。

collocations: duty of loyalty（英美惯用）
fiduciary duty 信义义务/受信义务
words.example_en: Directors, supervisors and senior managers shall assume the obligation of loyalty to the company and shall not exploit their authority to seek improper benefits.
words.example_zh: 董事、监事、高级管理人员对公司负有忠实义务，不得利用职权牟取不正当利益。
words.note: 英美公司法的 fiduciary duty 分为 duty of loyalty（忠实）与 duty of care（注意/勤勉）两支，与中国法忠实+勤勉的二分对应。

collocations: duty of care（英美惯用）
due diligence 尽职调查
words.example_en: Directors, supervisors and senior managers shall assume the obligation of diligence to the company and exercise reasonable care in performing their duties in the best interests of the company.
words.example_zh: 董事、监事、高级管理人员对公司负有勤勉义务，执行职务应当为公司的最大利益尽到管理者通常应有的合理注意。
words.note: 高频联想词 due diligence（尽职调查，简称 DD）：并购交易前对目标公司的全面调查。

collocations: affiliated relationship 关联关系
report to the board and abstain from voting 向董事会报告并回避表决
words.example_en: Where a director enters into a transaction with the company directly or indirectly, the director shall report to the board and the transaction shall be approved by resolution.
words.example_zh: 董事直接或者间接与本公司订立合同或者进行交易的，应当向董事会报告，并按照规定经决议通过。
words.note: abstain from voting 回避表决；self-dealing 自我交易。

words.zh_legal: 刺破公司面纱；法人人格否认
collocations: disregard of corporate personality 公司人格否认
abuse the independent status of the legal person 滥用法人独立地位
words.example_en: Where a shareholder abuses the independent status of the company as a legal person and the limited liability of shareholders to evade debts and seriously damages the interests of creditors, the shareholder shall bear joint and several liability for the debts of the company.
words.example_zh: 公司股东滥用公司法人独立地位和股东有限责任，逃避债务，严重损害公司债权人利益的，应当对公司债务承担连带责任。
words.note: 2023修订扩展至横向否认（兄弟公司之间）。veil 即"面纱"，比喻股东与公司之间的责任隔离。

collocations: bring a derivative action in one's own name 以自己的名义提起代表诉讼
for the benefit of the company 为公司利益
words.example_en: Where the board of supervisors or the board of directors refuses to sue, qualified shareholders may bring an action in their own name for the benefit of the company.
words.example_zh: 监事会或者董事会拒绝起诉的，符合条件的股东有权为了公司的利益以自己的名义直接向人民法院提起诉讼。
words.note: derivative 意为"派生的"——诉权派生自公司。与 direct action（股东直接诉讼）相区分。2023修订新增双重代表诉讼（全资子公司层面）。

words.zh_legal: 异议股东股份回购请求权
collocations: request the company to purchase the equity at a reasonable price 请求公司以合理价格收购股权
dissenting shareholder 异议股东
words.example_en: A shareholder who votes against the resolution on merger or division may request the company to purchase its equity at a reasonable price.
words.example_zh: 对股东会合并、分立决议投反对票的股东，可以请求公司按照合理的价格收购其股权。
words.note: 美国法称 appraisal right / dissenters' right。2023修订将其扩展适用于控股股东滥用权利的情形。

collocations: issuance of shares 股份发行
par value / no-par-value shares 面额股/无面额股
transfer of shares 股份转让
words.example_en: The capital of a joint stock limited company is divided into shares, which may be par-value shares or no-par-value shares.
words.example_zh: 股份有限公司的资本划分为股份。公司可以发行面额股，也可以发行无面额股。
words.note: 无面额股为2023修订新增。share（英）/ stock（美）；shareholding 持股。

collocations: issue shares at par value or at a premium 平价或溢价发行股份
initial public offering (IPO) 首次公开发行
private placement 非公开发行/定向增发
words.example_en: Shares shall be issued under the principles of fairness and impartiality, and shares of the same class shall carry the same rights.
words.example_zh: 股份的发行实行公平、公正的原则，同类别的每一股份应当具有同等权利。
words.note: 动词 issue；issuer 发行人（证券法高频）。不得折价发行：shall not be issued below par value。

collocations: buy back its own shares 回购本公司股份
treasury shares 库存股
employee stock ownership plan (ESOP) 员工持股计划
words.example_en: A company shall not acquire its own shares, except under statutory circumstances such as reducing the registered capital or using shares for employee stock ownership plans.
words.example_zh: 公司不得收购本公司股份，但减少注册资本、将股份用于员工持股计划等法定情形除外。
words.note: buyback 为口语化同义词。

collocations: issue corporate bonds 发行公司债券
bondholder 债券持有人
convertible bonds 可转换公司债券
words.example_en: Corporate bonds are negotiable securities issued by a company according to statutory procedures, with principal and interest to be repaid within an agreed period.
words.example_zh: 公司债券是公司依照法定程序发行、约定在一定期限还本付息的有价证券。
words.note: principal and interest 本息；maturity 到期日；default 违约（债券语境）。

collocations: distribute dividends 分配股利
profit distribution 利润分配
in proportion to the paid-in capital contributions 按实缴出资比例
words.example_en: After making up losses and making allocations to the statutory reserve, the company shall distribute profits to shareholders in proportion to their paid-in capital contributions.
words.example_zh: 公司弥补亏损和提取法定公积金后所余利润，按照股东实缴的出资比例分配。
words.note: 2023修订：股东会作出分配决议后，董事会应当在六个月内完成分配。

collocations: allocate 10% of the profits to the statutory reserve 提取利润的10%列入法定公积金
capital reserve 资本公积金
words.example_en: When distributing the after-tax profits of the current year, the company shall allocate 10% of the profits to its statutory reserve.
words.example_zh: 公司分配当年税后利润时，应当提取利润的百分之十列入公司法定公积金。
words.note: 累计额达注册资本50%后可不再提取。

collocations: merger by absorption 吸收合并
merger by new establishment 新设合并
mergers and acquisitions (M&A) 并购
words.example_en: The merger of a company may take the form of merger by absorption or merger by new establishment; the surviving company shall succeed to the claims and debts of the merged parties.
words.example_zh: 公司合并可以采取吸收合并或者新设合并。合并后存续的公司承继合并各方的债权、债务。
words.note: M&A 是涉外公司业务第一高频缩写。surviving company 存续公司。

collocations: the companies after division shall bear joint and several liability 分立后的公司承担连带责任
spin-off 分拆（国际惯用）
words.example_en: The debts of a company before its division shall be borne jointly and severally by the companies existing after the division, unless otherwise agreed with the creditors.
words.example_zh: 公司分立前的债务由分立后的公司承担连带责任，但与债权人另有约定的除外。
words.note: 国际交易文件中分立/分拆多用 spin-off、demerger 或 split-up。

collocations: the company is dissolved 公司解散
grounds for dissolution 解散事由
judicial dissolution 司法解散
words.example_en: Where the company is unable to continue operations due to a deadlock in management, shareholders holding 10% or more of the voting rights may request a people's court to dissolve the company.
words.example_zh: 公司经营管理发生严重困难，继续存续会使股东利益受到重大损失的，持有公司百分之十以上表决权的股东可以请求人民法院解散公司。
words.note: deadlock（公司僵局）为司法解散的核心事由。

words.zh_plain: liquid 普通义：液体（词源：使资产"流动/变现"）
collocations: liquidation group 清算组
liquidation expenses 清算费用
order of payment 清偿顺序
words.example_en: After paying the liquidation expenses, employees' wages, social insurance premiums and taxes owed, the remaining assets shall be distributed to shareholders.
words.example_zh: 公司财产在支付清算费用、职工工资、社会保险费用和所欠税款后，剩余财产分配给股东。
words.note: 动词 liquidate 即"变现清偿"；winding up 为英式同义词。区分清算（liquidation）与注销（deregistration）。

words.source: 公司法第237条（衔接企业破产法）
collocations: file for bankruptcy 申请破产
bankruptcy reorganization 破产重整
insolvency 资不抵债/无力偿债
words.example_en: Where the assets of the company are insufficient to pay off its debts in liquidation, the liquidation group shall apply to a people's court for a declaration of bankruptcy.
words.example_zh: 清算中发现公司财产不足清偿债务的，清算组应当依法向人民法院申请宣告破产。
words.note: 英式术语：公司破产用 insolvency / winding up，bankruptcy 仅指个人破产；美式则通用 bankruptcy（Chapter 11 重整 / Chapter 7 清算）。

collocations: wholly-owned subsidiary 全资子公司
parent company 母公司
branch 分公司
words.example_en: A subsidiary has the status of a legal person and independently bears civil liability; a branch does not have legal person status and its civil liability is borne by the company.
words.example_zh: 子公司具有法人资格，依法独立承担民事责任；分公司不具有法人资格，其民事责任由公司承担。
words.note: 子公司（独立法人）与分公司（branch，非法人）的责任区别是涉外架构设计的基础考点。

collocations: actual controller 实际控制人
de facto director 事实董事
control 控制权
words.example_en: A controlling shareholder or actual controller who instructs directors or senior managers to engage in acts damaging the interests of the company shall bear joint and several liability with them.
words.example_zh: 公司的控股股东、实际控制人指示董事、高级管理人员从事损害公司利益行为的，与该董事、高级管理人员承担连带责任。
words.note: 2023修订强化"影子董事/事实董事"规则。actual controller 实际控制人为中国法特色概念。

collocations: be listed on the stock exchange 在证券交易所上市
delisting 退市
disclosure 信息披露
words.example_en: A listed company shall disclose relevant information according to laws and administrative regulations.
words.example_zh: 上市公司应当依照法律、行政法规的规定披露相关信息。
words.note: go public / IPO 上市；listing rules 上市规则。

collocations: the audit committee composed of directors 由董事组成的审计委员会
replace the board of supervisors 替代监事会
words.example_en: A company may, as prescribed by its articles of association, establish an audit committee composed of directors within the board to exercise the functions of the board of supervisors, instead of establishing a board of supervisors.
words.example_zh: 公司可以按照公司章程的规定在董事会中设置由董事组成的审计委员会，行使监事会职权，不设监事会。
words.note: 2023修订标志性改革：引入单层制（one-tier board）治理选项。

collocations: the date of issuance of the business license 营业执照签发日期
company registration authority 公司登记机关
unified social credit code 统一社会信用代码
words.example_en: The date of issuance of the business license of a company shall be the date of its establishment.
words.example_zh: 公司营业执照签发日期为公司成立日期。
words.note: 2023修订确认电子营业执照（electronic business license）与纸质执照同等效力。

words.zh_legal: 一人公司（一人有限责任公司）
collocations: a limited liability company with only one shareholder 只有一个股东的有限责任公司
prove the company's assets are independent 证明公司财产独立
words.example_en: If the shareholder of a one-person company cannot prove that the company's assets are independent from the shareholder's own assets, the shareholder shall bear joint and several liability for the debts of the company.
words.example_zh: 一人公司的股东不能证明公司财产独立于股东自己的财产的，应当对公司债务承担连带责任。
words.note: 举证责任倒置是一人公司人格否认的特殊规则。2023修订允许设立一人股份有限公司。

words.source: 对照公司法第180条（董监高义务的英美法源）
collocations: fiduciary duty 信义义务
fiduciary relationship 信义关系
trustee 受托人
words.example_en: Directors owe fiduciary duties to the company and must act in good faith in the best interests of the company.
words.example_zh: 董事对公司负有信义义务，必须善意地为公司最佳利益行事。
words.note: 拉丁词源 fiducia（信任）。英美公司法、信托法的基石概念，统摄 duty of loyalty 与 duty of care。

collocations: agreement of promoters 发起人协议
establishment by means of promotion 发起设立
establishment by means of share offer 募集设立
words.example_en: A joint stock limited company shall have not less than 1 but not more than 200 promoters, who shall conclude an agreement of promoters and jointly draft the articles of association.
words.example_zh: 设立股份有限公司，应当有一人以上二百人以下为发起人。发起人应当签订发起人协议，共同制定公司章程。
words.note: 美国法对应概念 incorporator / promoter；发起人对设立行为承担连带责任。

collocations: incorporation 公司设立
incorporated in Delaware 在特拉华州注册成立
缩写 Inc.
words.example_en: The company was incorporated under the laws of the People's Republic of China with limited liability.
words.example_zh: 本公司系依据中华人民共和国法律设立的有限责任公司。
words.note: 合同主体条款标准表述：a company incorporated and existing under the laws of...（一家依据…法律设立并存续的公司）。

collocations: within / beyond the business scope 经营范围内/外
items subject to approval 须经批准的项目
words.example_en: The business scope of a company shall be prescribed in its articles of association; items subject to approval according to law shall be approved before registration.
words.example_zh: 公司的经营范围由公司章程规定。公司的经营范围中属于法律、行政法规规定须经批准的项目，应当依法经过批准。
words.note: 中国登记制度特色概念；英美公司法的对应历史概念是 ultra vires（越权）原则，现已基本废弃。

collocations: notice of forfeiture 失权通知
forfeit the equity 丧失股权
grace period 宽限期
words.example_en: Where a shareholder fails to pay the capital contribution within the grace period, the company may send a notice of forfeiture, and the shareholder shall forfeit the equity for which the contribution has not been paid.
words.example_zh: 股东在宽限期内仍未缴纳出资的，公司可以发出失权通知，该股东丧失其未缴纳出资的股权。
words.note: 2023修订新设制度。forfeit 动词（丧失/没收），刑事和海关语境 forfeiture 指财产没收。

collocations: consult and copy the articles of association, shareholders' register and board resolutions 查阅、复制公司章程、股东名册、决议
consult the accounting books 查阅会计账簿
words.example_en: Shareholders are entitled to consult and copy the articles of association, the shareholders' register, resolutions of meetings and financial and accounting reports of the company.
words.example_zh: 股东有权查阅、复制公司章程、股东名册、会议决议、财务会计报告。
words.note: 学理统称股东知情权（right to information / inspection rights）。2023修订扩展至会计凭证和全资子公司材料。

collocations: organize a trade union 组织工会
collective contract 集体合同
labor union（美式）
words.example_en: The employees of a company shall organize a trade union according to the Trade Union Law to carry out trade union activities and safeguard the lawful rights and interests of the employees.
words.example_zh: 公司职工依照《工会法》组织工会，开展工会活动，维护职工合法权益。
words.note: 劳动法联动词汇：collective bargaining 集体协商、labor dispute 劳动争议。

collocations: democratic management through the employees' congress 通过职工代表大会实行民主管理
employee representative director 职工董事
words.example_en: When studying and deciding on major issues concerning business operations or formulating important rules, a company shall solicit opinions through the employees' congress or by other means.
words.example_zh: 公司研究决定经营方面的重大问题、制定重要的规章制度时，应当通过职工代表大会或者其他形式听取意见。
words.note: 2023修订：职工人数三百人以上的有限责任公司，除依法设监事会并有职工监事外，董事会成员中应当有职工代表。

collocations: prepare the financial and accounting report at the end of each accounting year 每一会计年度终了时编制
audited by an accounting firm 经会计师事务所审计
balance sheet 资产负债表
words.example_en: A company shall prepare a financial and accounting report at the end of each accounting year, which shall be audited by an accounting firm according to law.
words.example_zh: 公司应当在每一会计年度终了时编制财务会计报告，并依法经会计师事务所审计。
words.note: 财报四件套：balance sheet 资产负债表、income statement 利润表、cash flow statement 现金流量表、notes 附注。

collocations: accounting firm 会计师事务所
auditor 审计师
audited financial statements 经审计的财务报表
words.example_en: The appointment or dismissal of the accounting firm undertaking the audit business of the company shall be decided by the shareholders' meeting or the board of directors as prescribed by the articles of association.
words.example_zh: 公司聘用、解聘承办公司审计业务的会计师事务所，按照公司章程的规定，由股东会或者董事会决定。
words.note: 尽调中 audited/unaudited statements 的区分直接影响陈述保证的写法。

collocations: provide a guarantee for another person 为他人提供担保
resolution of the board or the shareholders' meeting 董事会或股东会决议
guarantee for a shareholder 为股东提供担保
words.example_en: Where a company provides a guarantee for a shareholder or the actual controller, a resolution of the shareholders' meeting shall be adopted, and the shareholder concerned shall not participate in the voting.
words.example_zh: 公司为公司股东或者实际控制人提供担保的，应当经股东会决议，该股东不得参加表决。
words.note: 越权担保的效力是公司法与担保制度交叉的高频争议点；交易对手须审查担保决议（resolution review）。

words.source: 公司法第十四章（法律责任）
collocations: impose a fine of not less than... nor more than... 处…以上…以下的罚款
administrative penalty 行政处罚
words.example_en: Where a company obtains registration by submitting false materials, the registration authority shall impose a fine and may revoke its business license if the circumstances are serious.
words.example_zh: 提交虚假材料取得公司登记的，由登记机关处以罚款；情节严重的，吊销营业执照。
words.note: fine（行政/刑事罚款，交国库）与 default fine/liquidated damages（违约金，付对方）必须区分。

words.source: 公司法第十四章（法律责任）
collocations: confiscate the illegal gains 没收违法所得
confiscation of property（刑法）没收财产
words.example_en: The illegal gains derived from the violation shall be confiscated by the competent authority according to law.
words.example_zh: 违法行为的违法所得，由主管机关依法予以没收。
words.note: illegal gains / unlawful proceeds 违法所得；反洗钱语境 asset forfeiture 资产没收。

words.source: 公司法第十四章（法律责任）
collocations: order to rectify within a time limit 责令限期改正
rectification report 整改报告
words.example_en: The company registration authority shall order the company to rectify the violation within a time limit; if it fails to do so, a fine shall be imposed.
words.example_zh: 公司登记机关应当责令公司限期改正；逾期未改正的，处以罚款。
words.note: 监管函件高频词；动词 rectify。合规语境 remediation（整改补救）为近义词。

collocations: apply for deregistration 申请注销登记
simplified deregistration 简易注销
the company is terminated upon deregistration 公司经注销登记终止
words.example_en: After the liquidation of the company is completed, the liquidation group shall apply to the company registration authority for deregistration, and the company shall be terminated upon deregistration.
words.example_zh: 公司清算结束后，清算组应当向公司登记机关申请注销公司登记。公司经注销登记，终止。
words.note: 终止三部曲顺序：解散（dissolution）→ 清算（liquidation）→ 注销（deregistration）。2023修订新增简易注销和强制注销制度。

collocations: wholly state-owned company 国有独资公司
state-owned enterprise (SOE) 国有企业
performing the contributor's functions 履行出资人职责
words.example_en: State-funded companies refer to wholly state-owned companies and companies in which the State holds a controlling or equity stake.
words.example_zh: 国家出资公司是指国有独资公司，以及国有资本控股公司、参股公司。
words.note: SOE 是涉外谈判高频词；2023修订专章规定国家出资公司，党委研究讨论为重大决策前置程序。

words.source: 对照公司法第180条第3款、第192条
collocations: de facto director 事实董事
instruct directors to act 指示董事行事
words.example_en: Where the controlling shareholder or actual controller does not serve as a director but actually executes the affairs of the company, the provisions on the duties of loyalty and diligence shall apply to them.
words.example_zh: 公司的控股股东、实际控制人不担任公司董事但实际执行公司事务的，适用忠实义务和勤勉义务的规定。
words.note: shadow director（藏在幕后发指令）与 de facto director（未经任命但实际履职）源自英国公司法；2023修订引入对应规则。

collocations: preferred shares 优先股
shares with special voting rights 特别表决权股
class meeting 类别股东会
words.example_en: A company may issue class shares that differ from ordinary shares, such as shares with priority in the distribution of profits or with more or fewer voting rights per share.
words.example_zh: 公司可以发行与普通股权利不同的类别股，如利润分配优先的股份、每一股表决权多于或少于普通股的股份。
words.note: 2023修订正式确立类别股制度。对应美国 dual-class structure（双层股权结构，科技公司常用）。

collocations: authorize the board to issue shares 授权董事会发行股份
not exceeding 50% of the issued shares 不超过已发行股份的50%
words.example_en: The articles of association or the shareholders' meeting may authorize the board of directors to decide, within three years, on the issuance of shares not exceeding fifty percent of the issued shares.
words.example_zh: 公司章程或者股东会可以授权董事会在三年内决定发行不超过已发行股份百分之五十的股份。
words.note: 2023修订部分引入英美授权资本制（authorized capital system），增强股份公司融资灵活性。

collocations: entrust a proxy to attend the meeting 委托代理人出席会议
proxy statement（美）股东会委托声明书
power of attorney 授权委托书
words.example_en: A shareholder may entrust a proxy to attend the shareholders' meeting and exercise voting rights within the scope of authorization.
words.example_zh: 股东可以委托代理人出席股东会会议，代理人应当在授权范围内行使表决权。
words.note: proxy fight/contest（委托书争夺战）是敌意收购经典戏码。

collocations: information disclosure 信息披露
disclose truthfully, accurately and completely 真实、准确、完整地披露
insider information 内幕信息
words.example_en: A listed company shall disclose information truthfully, accurately and completely according to laws and administrative regulations.
words.example_zh: 上市公司应当依照法律、行政法规的规定，真实、准确、完整地披露信息。
words.note: 证券法核心义务；misrepresentation/false statement 虚假陈述、material omission 重大遗漏为披露违规两大形态。

words.source: 对照公司法第9条（经营范围）
collocations: an ultra vires act 越权行为
act beyond the business scope 超越经营范围
words.example_en: Under modern company law, a contract is not invalid merely because it is ultra vires the company's business scope.
words.example_zh: 按照现代公司法，合同不因超越公司经营范围而当然无效。
words.note: 拉丁语"超越权限"。英美法的 ultra vires doctrine 已基本废弃，中国法亦同（超范围经营合同原则上有效）。

words.source: 对照公司法第73条（董事会会议）
collocations: constitute a quorum 构成法定人数
the quorum for board meetings 董事会的法定出席人数
words.example_en: A meeting of the board of directors may be held only when more than half of the directors are present.
words.example_zh: 董事会会议应当有过半数的董事出席方可举行。
words.note: 中国公司法用"过半数出席"规则表达同等含义；涉外合资章程和股东协议中 quorum 条款必不可少。

collocations: certificate of incorporation 公司设立证书（美）
adopt / amend the bylaws 通过/修改章程细则
words.example_en: A Delaware corporation is governed by its certificate of incorporation and bylaws.
words.example_zh: 特拉华州公司受其设立证书和章程细则的规制。
words.note: 美国公司宪章文件分两层：certificate/articles of incorporation（对外登记）+ bylaws（内部治理细则）；中国的公司章程一份文件兼具两者功能。

words.source: 公司法第五章第五节（上市公司）
collocations: be listed on a stock exchange 在证券交易所上市
Shanghai Stock Exchange (SSE) 上交所
Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKEX) 港交所
words.example_en: A listed company is a joint stock limited company whose shares are listed and traded on a stock exchange.
words.example_zh: 上市公司是指其股票在证券交易所上市交易的股份有限公司。
words.note: bourse（法语借词）为同义词；OTC（over-the-counter）场外交易与场内交易相对。

collocations: publish a prospectus 公告招股说明书
subscription form 认股书
misstatement in the prospectus 招股书虚假陈述
words.example_en: Where shares are offered to the public, the promoters shall publish a prospectus and prepare subscription forms.
words.example_zh: 发起人向社会公开募集股份，应当公告招股说明书，并制作认股书。
words.note: 证券虚假陈述诉讼的主战场文件；美国注册制下对应 registration statement（S-1）。

words.zh_plain: concern 普通义：担忧；此处义为"企业"
collocations: on a going concern basis 以持续经营为基础
going concern value 持续经营价值
liquidation value 清算价值
words.example_en: The financial statements have been prepared on a going concern basis.
words.example_zh: 本财务报表以持续经营为基础编制。
words.note: 审计报告中的 going concern qualification（持续经营存疑的保留意见）是重大风险信号；破产重整的核心逻辑即保全 going concern value。

collocations: take out liability insurance for directors 为董事投保责任保险
缩写 D&O insurance
words.example_en: A company may take out liability insurance covering the compensation liability of directors arising from the performance of their duties during their term of office.
words.example_zh: 公司可以在董事任职期间为董事因执行公司职务承担的赔偿责任投保责任保险。
words.note: 2023修订新增条文；investee 公司治理尽调与上市公司董监高履职的标配安排。

collocations: in compliance with laws and regulations 符合法律法规
compliance officer 合规官
non-compliance 违规
words.example_en: The company shall establish an internal compliance system to ensure that its operations comply with applicable laws, regulations and regulatory requirements.
words.example_zh: 公司应当建立内部合规体系，确保经营活动符合可适用的法律、法规和监管要求。
words.note: 动词搭配 comply with；反垄断、数据、反腐败（FCPA）是涉外合规三大高压区。

words.source: 公司法第98条（对照证券发行）
collocations: underwriter 承销商
firm commitment underwriting 包销
best efforts underwriting 代销
words.example_en: Shares offered to the public shall be underwritten by a securities company established according to law.
words.example_zh: 向社会公开募集的股份应当由依法设立的证券公司承销。
words.note: 词源"在（风险）下面签名"——保险语境 underwriting 指核保，underwriter 指保险人。

collocations: issue share certificates 签发股票
capital contribution certificate 出资证明书
registered shares 记名股票
words.example_en: After a joint stock limited company is established, it shall deliver share certificates or other equity vouchers to its shareholders.
words.example_zh: 股份有限公司成立后，应当向股东正式交付股票或者其他股权凭证。
words.note: 有限责任公司对应文件是出资证明书（capital contribution certificate）；无纸化时代由证券登记结算机构以电子簿记方式记录（book-entry）。
